---
title: "Code Cutoff Demo"
format:
  html:
    css: bgcode.css
    theme: Cosmo
    toc: false
    self-contained: false
  # pdf:
  #   browser: chrome
execute:
  echo: false
---

# Normal Content

Some normal text.

---

::: {#code-container}
```{r background-script, echo=FALSE, results='asis'}
  cat("```r\n")
for(i in 1:200){

  cat(i," > This is a long line of code that would normally expand vertically.\n")
}
cat("\n```")

```

:::
